title: Improvements in or relating to closure capping heads
abstract: A picking member for a closure capping head is provided. The member is a one-piece member and comprises one or more resilient gripping elements (4, 6) for gripping a closure in use, and is inserted into a chuck (2) which is provided with recesses (3) which can be used to clean and disinfect the chuck.
claims: Claims A picking member for a closure capping head, the member comprising one or more gripping elements for gripping a closure in use. A closure capping head chuck comprising a picking member, the member comprising one or more spring fingers for gripping a closure in use. A closure capping head for applying to a container, the head comprising one elastic element for gripping onto a closure, the elastic element is attached to a chuck, wherein the chuck comprising at least one cleaning window. A head as claimed in claim 3, wherein the elastic element consists of one piece. A head as claimed in claim 3 or 4, wherein the elastic element is a spring pick element. A head as claimed in any one of claims 3 to 5, wherein the spring pick element comprises one or more spring or feather elements. A head as claimed in claim 6, wherein the spring pick element comprises six spring elements. 8. A head as claimed in any one of claims 3 to 7, wherein the spring pick element is inserted into the chuck. 9. A head as claimed in any one of claims 3 to 8, wherein the chuck comprising recesses serving as cleaning windows for the chuck and/or the spring pick element. 10. A spring pick element for a closure capping head chuck, the element comprising a plurality of spring or feather elements for gripping a closure in use. I I . A capping head chuck spring member comprising a one-piece member having a plurality of resilient fingers for gripping a closure in use. 1 2. A picking member substantially as hereinbefore described with reference to, and as shown in, the accompanying drawings. 1 3. A closure capping machine including one or more chucks as claimed in any preceding claim. 14. A closure capping system comprising one or more picking members as claimed in any preceding claim. 1 5. A method of applying a closure with a capping head substantially as hereinbefore described with reference to, and as shown in, the accompanying drawings.
